  Log:

  Math::Polygon::Calc and Math::Polygon::Clip.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Math-Polygon/
  
  PR:             ports/130302
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
